zh.Soissons,02722,Aisne,Hauts-de-France,Fra: 法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯索頌斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond於大約1187年出生在法國崔艾-吉洛易德時，他的父親Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine34歲，母親Yolande de Coucy24歲。他於1213年2月與Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1250年5月26日享年64歲，埋葬在法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯索頌斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond于大约1187年出生在法国崔艾-吉洛易德时，他的父亲Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine34岁，母亲Yolande de Coucy24岁。他于1213年2月与Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1250年5月26日享年64岁，埋葬在法国豪-德-福朗斯艾斯索頌斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pierre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond was born about 1187, in Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France, his father, Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine, was 34 and his mother, Yolande de Coucy, was 24. He married Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany in February 1213. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 26 May 1250, at the age of 64, and was buried in Soissons, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France.

fr.Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loi: Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond est né environ 1187, à Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France, son père, Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Yolande de Coucy, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany en février 1213. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 26 mai 1250, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Soissons, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France.

de.Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loi: Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond um 1187 in Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine 34 und seine Mutter Yolande de Coucy 24. Er hat im Februar 1213 Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 26. Mai 1250 im Alter von 64 Jahren und wurde in Soissons, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

Lui sposato Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany nel febbraio 1213. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 26 maggio 1250, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Soissons, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmondが約1187年にフランスセントアエウレ-エト-ロイルドレウックスで生まれた時，父Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braineは34歳，母Yolande de Coucyは24歳であった。1213年2月にAlix de Thouars Duchess of Brittanyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1250年5月26日に64歳で死去し，フランスハウトス-デ-フランスエイスンソイソンスにて埋葬された。

ko.Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loi: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 난츠
ko.lifeSummary: Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond(이)가 대략 1187년 프랑스 세트르 우레-트-로이르 드레우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Yolande de Coucy(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1213년 2월 Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1250년 5월 26일 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 아이스니 소이손스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond nasceu aproximadamente 1187, em Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, França, seu pai, Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Yolande de Coucy, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany em fevereiro de 1213. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 26 de maio de 1250, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Soissons, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, França.

ru.Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loi: нантесь, лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond родился около 1187 г. в местности дреукс, эуре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Yolande de Coucy, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany февраль 1213 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 26 мая 1250 г. в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности соиссонс, эисн, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция.

Se casó con Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany en febrero de 1213. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija.
